business_description: Sakura Spa is a massage therapy business located in Barrie, Ontario, offering a variety of massage services including deep tissue, regular, and hot stone massages. They provide flexible scheduling with both 30-minute and hourly sessions to accommodate different client needs.
scheduling_insight: Open Wednesday to Sunday, closed Monday and Tuesday
highlights: Offers insurance reimbursement assistance for clients
Flexible session lengths with both 30-minute and hourly options
Multiple massage modalities including deep tissue and hot stone
